name: linkerd
explanation: Linkerd's data-plane proxy exposes Prometheus-format metrics on its admin port (default 9990) at the fixed path /admin/metrics/prometheus. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 with a hard-coded metric map; once the endpoint URL is supplied, no auth or further configuration is needed. The spec ships an example openmetrics_endpoint of http://localhost:9990/admin/metrics/prometheus, which is the universal Linkerd admin path. Discovery is a generic 'GET /admin/metrics/prometheus on port 9990 and verify Prometheus-format response' probe.
notes: Pattern A (OpenMetrics on a known port). No auto_conf.yaml ships, but k8s deployments typically use the istio-style label-based autodiscovery on the linkerd-proxy container.
